programme.title: Addams 217
programme.desc: Addams 217

programme.title: Love Boat 121
programme.desc: Love Boat 121

programme.title: Daktari
programme.desc: Replacing the ill guide Tracy brings a safari client onto a game reserve unaware that the woman has a personal vendetta to settle with the killer leopard that is known to stalk the area

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Scalped stolen opera tickets land Jonathan in the middle of a plot to assassinate the DA who is fighting organized crime

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey head a task force to track down a pair of burglars posing as police officers

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: An armored car driver is forced to collect money for a band of robbers who are holding his pregnant wife hostage Starsky and Hutch have only a few hours to locate his wife and rescue the driver as this gangs mo is to leave no witnesses alive

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: With the crew earning some down time and Airwolf some much-needed repair time Dom takes a trip to help out an old war buddy But he soon finds himself in the middle of both a family feud and a dangerous drug-smuggling ringwithout the help of Airwolf!

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Using a cursed pen a pulp writer transforms himself into an acclaimed novelist who is known for getting inside the minds of serial killers

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: When Froy is seriously injured on a routine repo the building confrontation between Lou and Matt continues to escalate

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Betty Jos due date is fast approaching with everyone in Hooterville excited by another baby being born in the valley delivered by Doc Stuart Uncle Joe and his friends discuss names for the baby which they want to sound strong and presidential such as Joe Carson Elliott Sam Drucker Elliott or Newt Kiley Elliott Steve throws Betty Jo and all the Bradleys for a loop when he announces that he has made arrangements with relatives in Baltimore for Betty Jo to stay there and have the baby delivered by one of the finest gynecologists in one of the finest hospitals in the country

programme.title: TBH 205
programme.desc: TBH 205

programme.title: TBH 115
programme.desc: TBH 115

programme.title: Munsters 229
programme.desc: Munsters 229

programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E23

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E26
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E26

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and Carol head out to Pine Lake Lodge for a little rest and relaxation leaving Ed at home

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur gives away Ed to a prospective client in order to secure a home architecture job

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Although his son has been seriously hurt in an accident one of Lucas neighboring ranchers refuses to let him have medical assistance and because of that the boy may well die

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When North Forks lovely schoolteacher attempts to organize a womens suffrage movement the towns less progressive element decides to run her out of town

programme.title: Gunsmoke S05E08 Saludos
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S05E08 Saludos

programme.title: Gunsmoke S04E05 Letter of the Law
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S04E05 Letter of the Law

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Joe is accused of murdering a girl Her father and brothers want to hang Joe and the Cartwrights race to prove his innocence

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki Ryan and Jack pursue an antique beehive containing vampire bees that suck the life out of their victims

programme.title: Demons 2
programme.desc: Various residents of a high-rise apartment building are watching a film being broadcast on television The films story follows several teens who trespass into a city that was deserted and walled-off due to the Demon outbreak from the first film Finding the demons corpse one of the teens revives it accidentally when blood drips from a scratch into the demons mouth

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Doug and Roxanne move to Springwood but while Dougs at work Roxanne begins to unpack and discovers that a mix-up with the movers has left their house filled with someone elses possessions -- in the boxes she finds bloody knives and shredded dresses Meanwhile Emily discovers a stack of 19th century love letters hidden behind a panel in her new home and she begins to envision the relationships of the authors

programme.title: Tales from Crypt
programme.desc: In a research lab when two colleagues accidentally inject an experimental virus into their sleazy boss that will eventually kill him he tries to get revenge on them believing it was no accident

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Danny Darwin learns that his new tattoo might be more than just a tattoo

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A stressed out bank employee begins having premonitions concerning a serial killer who could be any one of the men in her life

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Sweet singer Miranda and her musician partner Sean are a couple of struggling songwriters who are trying desperately to break into the rock music business Miranda creates a sexy new image for herself in order to achieve the fame and success she desires However Miranda winds up paying an extremely heavy spiritual price because of said sexy image

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Knight 309
programme.desc: Knight 309

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki Ryan and Jack travel to a small town where the disappearance of several children is linked to a mysterious toy playhouse

programme.title: Hogans 325
programme.desc: Hogans 325

programme.title: Mchale 406
programme.desc: Mchale 406

programme.title: Mchale 330
programme.desc: Mchale 330

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter asks Gomer to take his place on a date

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carters adopted Korean daughter arrives-but shes not the little girl he remembers

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways desperately try to find a new water source as they have completely exhausted their current water supply

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Japanese soldier arrives on the island thinks its still WWII and holds the castaways prisoner on their own island

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When it seems that Grandpas location of water by divining rod is a failure Luke employs a geologist and drilling equipment as Amos gloats at the apparent unsuccessful outcome of Lukes chosen methods

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa solicits George MacMichaels help in turning the tables on two swindlers who convinced him to pay 35 for a worthless dog but he begins to have a change of heart when he discovers that Little Luke has become quite attached to the animal

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Now knowing that Max is a spy Max and his Army buddy go up against the KAOS agent know as the Maestro

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max ends up as a Fugitive after he is convicted of robbing a bank and killing a man On his way to the death house he sees the one-hand man and escapes to find him

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ Callie and Stacks help BJs old friend Steven Thomas Ulysses Nathaniel Travis complete the filming of his television pilot Buster Crabbe is outstanding as an aging stuntman with a secret

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The wives horn in on Wilbur and Rogers duck hunting trip

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Rogers brother-in-law is begging Wilbur to write a follow-up hit song to Pretty Little Filly He wants it to be a blues number so Wilbur does his best to get Ed in a depressed mood

programme.title: Hogans 317
programme.desc: Hogans 317

programme.title: Love Boat 107
programme.desc: Love Boat 107

programme.title: WKRP 110
programme.desc: WKRP 110

programme.title: WKRP 112
programme.desc: WKRP 112

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: The first game of the new football season and Wood finds himself locked in a sauna with Freida

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Ava tries to discredit Harlan as an expert witness in court

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Dan is targeted by a man whos trying to get a gaming license because Dan has a videotape that shows him consorting with criminals He sends a professional hit man to get Dan but he misses He abducts Mitch Costigian Dans friend and holds him to get Dan to turn the tape over to him

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: An innocent woman is blackmailed by her ex-husband into using their son to extort money from Jonathan

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: George becomes a hero after rescuing the occupants of a car that crashed into a lake Dick wants to celebrate his heroism by having George as a guest on his television show but Michael insists on booking a young science-contest winner

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Larry Darryl and Darryl begin feudin with the Loudons after Dick reports their trouble-making pet goat to Animal Control The feud threatens to prevent Stephanie and Michaels vacation to the tropics

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan and The Skipper find a government briefcase with top-secret information in the lagoon and when Gilligan handcuffs himself to the briefcase he becomes afraid that the enemy will come to the island and kill him

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: A space shuttle accidentally drops a load of radio active dust which lands in a farmers field Mitch and Griff have to handle the work of cleaning up the strange matter when Ryan is infected by the stuff

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A wandering energy force inhabits the body of Alpha technician Anton Zoref turning him into an energy absorbing being

programme.title: King Kong Vs Godzilla
programme.desc: Godzilla a prehistoric monster emerges from hibernation while a pharmaceutical company seeks publicity by bringing in another monster When the two battle it out death and destruction follow

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke learn that their artist friend Grannie Annie is the mastermind behind a small-time counterfeiting ring After her arrest Boss seizes the engraving plates to sell to no-nonsense counterfeiter Big John Downey Bo and Luke work to clear Annies name unaware that their efforts may have deadly consequences for Boss

programme.title: Hercules 216
programme.desc: Hercules 216

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A Jaridian probe lands on Earth and begins sucking energy from the Comonality The Taelons use humans in a near-death state to keep their connection while Lili and Sandoval try to find out what is draining the energy

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens develop a new drug made from human brain tissue planning to use it to control human society

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A young loner who believes he is a vampire is accused of murdering his mothers boyfriend

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: After seemingly having no interest for so many episodes what happened to Jim Tressa is suddenly in Peru and sidetracked by a voice from her past on a radio

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: After destroying an asteroid on a collision course with the moon an even larger obstacle appears - an entire planet! On a recon mission John Koenig encounters an inhabitant who convinces him- on the basis of faith- that the moon and the planet must collide But no one else supports Koenigs stand

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A fake mind reader recognizes Dr Kimble To bolster TV ratings for his act he provides the police with clues designed to show his psychic prowess

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: The arrival of an old friend of Victoria and Toms causes trouble in the Valley due to the mans claim on a plot of land which has been earmarked as the location of a new dam

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: In a politically turbulent Mexico full of revolutionaries Cheyenne encounters a sexy blond pickpocket singer in Rio Hondo She arrived on the stage with a local rancher who owes Cheyenne money from a cattle deal and he wants to be paid

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Noah is taken into slavery when he tries to free his former teacher Calvin Roundtree

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A small-time crook runs afoul of the police and the mob; guests Tom Bosley Sheree North Barry Atwater

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Briggs poses as an American tourist and subjects himself to a show trial in order to discredit a public prosecutor attempting to seize absolute power in his country

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon try to track down the driver who hit and run with a pedestrian

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives break up a gambling ring Friday is undercover

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A man comes forward and admits to having seen the one-armed man running from the house the night of Helen Kimbles murder This gives Richard Kimble hope of another trial which could clear his name Will this man be willing to testify; and will his testimony be enough

programme.title: Laser Mission
programme.desc: Action superstar Brandon Lee portrays rebellious government agent Michael Gold who is sent on a desperate mission to a Soviet-controlled African nation in order to uncover a top-secret laser weapons operation and destroy it

programme.title: Revenge of the Ninja
programme.desc: A Japanese gallery owner denies his violent ninja heritage until American drug traffickers kidnap his young son

programme.title: Bail Out
programme.desc: A sleazy bail bondsman thinks he has finally gotten his big break when a millionaire heiress gets busted with drug dealers If she shows up in court it could mean a million dollars to him If she doesnt he could be ruined When the deal gets too complicated he hires a playboy bounty hunter to keep an eye on his investment But who is going to keep an eye on him

programme.title: Embryo
programme.desc: A twisted scientist performs an experiment on a human foetus to accelerate growth from a foetus into an adult in just a few days The experiment results in a beautiful 22-year-old woman who falls in love with her creator

programme.title: Wavelength
programme.desc: Two young lovers learn that a small group of child-like space aliens are marooned on Earth and are being held prisoner at a top secret military facility The couple then decide to liberate the extraterrestrial castaways and help them make a rendezvous with a rescue ship sent from the alien home planet

programme.title: The Return of Swamp Thing
programme.desc: The evil Arcanes stepdaughter helps the muck-monster defeat the madman before he can unleash his genetic mutations Based on DC Comics characters

programme.title: Miracle of the White Stallions
programme.desc: In 1945 the fate of Viennas famous Lipizzaner stallions hangs into balance American general Patton could save them but first he asks to see them perform

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: Fortress

programme.title: The Presidents Plane Is Missing
programme.desc: An American President stumbles upon a secret world-threatening crisis

programme.title: The Savage Bees
programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.title: Runaway
programme.desc: A group of skiers are trapped inside a runaway train hurtling down a mountainside

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD agents try to convince Gadget that he can replace the King of Pianostan

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain head to an island in the Pacific Ocean where MAD plan to explode an underwater bomb

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades try to take over GoBotron by replacing the Guardian leaders with robotic ringers

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Guardians launch an all-out effort to find and destroy Rogue-Star

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The Lightning League lands on a desert planet with no plant life assuming that is where Audric would be They are mistakenly led by a mirage of Audric to try and rescue him but they are attacked by the native nomads who have been tricked

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: While teaching the cat people of a planet war strategy Oon wanders from lecture to lecture feeling unneeded and worthless Gillian discovers the planet houses a Nightwalker which is kept behind enormous tall doors and sealed with a gold symbol

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: An ancient crystal skull is stolen during an auction By looking through it Miles Mayhem learns Matt Trakkers identity as the leader of MASK and blackmails him into giving up the rest of his secrets and technology

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: During Glorias first Indy 500 race all electronic devices suddenly come to a stop thanks to a powerful EMP device VENOM is projecting from a blimp Their next target the International Safe Corporation

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late
